ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density per square kilometer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the borough data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic entry */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough for which the statistics apply */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the statistics apply */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Total count of population samples */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean population count */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of population count */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum population count recorded */,
  "q1" INTEGER /* First quartile of population count */,
  "median" INTEGER /* Median population count */,
  "q3" INTEGER /* Third quartile of population count */,
  "max" INTEGER /* Maximum population count recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the device and browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough for which the report is generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for user-specific settings */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
